meta-description: Learn about dental coverage by reviewing the definiton in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Dental coverage
excerpt: Benefits that help pay for the cost of visits to a dentist for basic or preventive services, like teeth cleaning, X-rays, and fillings. In the Marketplace, dental coverage is available either as part of a Marketplace health plan, or by itself through a separate dental plan.
content:
Benefits that help pay for the cost of visits to a dentist for basic or preventive services, like teeth cleaning, X-rays, and fillings. In the Marketplace, dental coverage is available either as part of a Marketplace health plan, or by itself through a separate dental plan.
